name: Macaroni Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Elbow macaroni (small), cooked according to directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pasta well.
2. Mix in the oil and vinegar and stir until combined.
3. Add all other ingredients and mix thoroughly.
4. Refrigerate overnight.
5. The next day, if needed, add more mayo and mix well.
6. Adjust for salt and pepper as desired. After sitting overnight, it tends to need more salt.
